name: codex-agentic-pilot
description: GitHub-native autonomous software development team pilot

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.agent:issue: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js issue
scripts.agent:review: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js review
scripts.agent:release: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js release
scripts.agent:incident: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js incident
scripts.governance:report: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js governance
